text.title: vui-iot-integration Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 3-room smart home voice config with movie-night + good-night scenes.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Three-room home (bedroom, living room, kitchen) on Matter network. Scenes: 'good night', 'movie night'. Routines: 'leaving home'.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. User says 'good night'; if thermostat unreachable, voice reports 'lights off; thermostat unreachable.'
